name: I'm floating in the Sky
hints: Floating in the sky! Most directions lead to unknown areas. FEEL around to find hidden doors.
FEEL NORTH, FEEL SOUTH, FEEL WEST, and FEEL EAST to search for invisible doors in each direction.

FEEL NORTH finds a door leading to a hidden office (room 21) with a gem. FEEL SOUTH finds a door to another office (room 23) with a gem. FEEL WEST/EAST/UP find nothing special. FEEL DOWN detects the floor. EAST returns to the skyscraper.
Use FEEL NORTH to enter room 21 and FEEL SOUTH to enter room 23 - both have gems. N/S/W exits without feeling lead to room 19 (mystery).

effects: Message: the floor in that direction.
Message: the floor in that direction.

notes: Floating in the sky - invisible room with hidden doors. FEEL NORTH enters office with gem (room 21). FEEL SOUTH enters office with gem (room 23). N/S/W exits without FEEL go to room 19. EAST returns to skyscraper side (room 17). FEEL DOWN/AROUND detects the floor.
